title: Heart valves
script_summary: Explore the fascinating role of heart valves in our circulatory system.

segments.voiceover: What if I told you your heart has secret gates?
Heart valves control blood flow, ensuring it moves in the right direction. But how do they do this?
There are four main valves: tricuspid, pulmonary, mitral, and aortic. Each plays a critical role.
They open and close with each heartbeat, preventing backflow. But what happens when they malfunction?
Valve diseases can lead to serious health issues. Monitoring your heart health is essential!
Curious about how to keep your heart healthy? Follow for more insights!
